curriculumData.title: Module 1: AI Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC)
curriculumData.desc: This module establishes foundational AI policies and maps risk frameworks (such as NIST, EU AI Act, and ISO 42001) to manage financial and third-party compliance. As a learner, you will discover how to operationalize practical governance, protecting sensitive enterprise information using Microsoft Purview. By the end of this module, expect to be able to design comprehensive AI security governance models across Azure workloads and enforce robust data protection strategies to meet regulatory demands.

curriculumData.title: Module 2: AI Infrastructure & Zero Trust Identity
curriculumData.desc: In this module, you will learn to secure the underlying network, APIs, and identities (both human and machine) accessing the AI ecosystem through a strict Zero Trust lens. We will set expectations for designing robust security perimeters and architecting identity solutions specific to AI workloads using Microsoft Entra ID. Expect to master the deployment of conditional access, workload identities, private endpoints, and advanced threat protection to safeguard your AI infrastructure.

curriculumData.title: Module 3: AI Data Security & Information Protection
curriculumData.desc: Discover how to classify and protect sensitive data flowing into AI and RAG applications while proactively detecting risky insider behaviors. This module broadens your expertise in data lifecycle management, focusing on securing AI interactions using Microsoft Purview. You will learn to mitigate AI-specific data security risks across enterprise and browser-based AI apps. Expect to gain hands-on knowledge in implementing sensitivity labels, DLP, and adaptive protection to secure your data estate.

curriculumData.title: Module 4: AI App Safety, Copilot & Agentic Guardrails
curriculumData.desc: This module focuses on securing the application layer against prompt injections, safeguarding agentic logic, and governing Copilot plugin supply chains. You will cover the essential fundamentals of AI app security required to safely support Microsoft 365 Copilot and Enterprise Agentic AI. Expect to learn how to deploy prompt shields, configure content filters, apply strict access scopes, and utilize Azure AI Content Safety and Microsoft Foundry to ensure safe enterprise AI deployments.

curriculumData.title: Module 5: AI Posture Management & Threat Defense
curriculumData.desc: Continuously discover Shadow AI, hunt for active threats, and automate adversarial machine learning testing. This comprehensive module deepens your understanding of AI security vulnerabilities and essential controls. You will learn to actively protect AI workloads using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and enhance security operations with Microsoft Security Copilot. Expect to develop advanced skills in red teaming, anomaly detection, and implementing automated defenses against emerging AI-specific cyber threats.
